islands.name: Moosewood
islands.description: Moosewood is a location in the center of the First Sea, serving as the default spawn location for new players.

islands.name: Sunstone Island
islands.description: Sunstone Island is a Location in the First Sea that can be found North-East of Moosewood, past Haddock Rock.

islands.name: Snowcap Island
islands.description: Snowcap Island is a Location in the First Sea found to the south-east of Moosewood.

islands.name: Roslit Bay
islands.description: Roslit Bay is a Location in the First Sea that can be found to the West of Moosewood.

islands.name: Forsaken Shores
islands.description: Forsaken Shores is a location in the First Sea located south-west of Roslit Bay.

islands.name: The Depths
islands.description: The Depths is a sublocation of Vertigo, located behind a large gate at the bottom of the Vertigos Dip.

islands.name: Vertigo
islands.description: Vertigo, also known as The Abyss, is an underground location accessible via any Strange Whirlpool found in the Ocean.

islands.name: Ancient Isle
islands.description: The Ancient Isle is a large island in the First Sea surrounded by a series of much smaller islands located in the far east of the map, far out between Snowcap Island and Mushgrove Swamp.

islands.name: Above The Clouds
islands.description: Above The Clouds is a location accessible by completing a flying minigame with the Hang Glider; it begins in Castaway Cliffs at 628, 327, -2051.

islands.name: Atlantis
islands.description: Atlantis is a large area beneath the Ocean that features several puzzles and a late-game content that may be useful for progressing into end-game content (e.g.

islands.name: Azure Lagoon
islands.description: Azure Lagoon is a Location in the Second Sea that can be found South-West of Waveborne.

islands.name: Boreal Pines
islands.description: Boreal Pines is a large snowy pine forest with many icicles protruding from the ground.

islands.name: Castaway Cliffs
islands.description: Castaway Cliffs is a Location in the First Sea located North of The Arch and North-East of the Statue of Sovereignty.

islands.name: Crimson Cavern
islands.description: Crimson Cavern is a sublocation of Desolate Deep, unlocked by completing Crimson Guard's quest.

islands.name: Crystal Cove
islands.description: Crystal Cove is a sublocation of The Depths, located inside a tunnel found in the ruins of The Depths.

islands.name: Cultist Lair
islands.description: Cultist Lair is a large area featuring several puzzles and quests as they venture deeper down into the multiple layers of the Lair.

islands.name: Cursed Isle
islands.description: Cursed Isle is a location that can be found North of Snowcap Island, South-West of Earmark Island, spawning during Foggy Spring/Autumn Nights.

islands.name: Desolate Deep
islands.description: The Desolate Deep is an extensive system of caves located beneath the First Sea behind Sunstone Island and the Statue of Sovereignty.

islands.name: Emberreach
islands.description: Emberreach is a Location in the Second Sea that can be found West of Waveborne, past Pine Shoals.

islands.name: Everturn Forest
islands.description: Everturn Forest is a location that can be found North from Mushgrove Swamp.

islands.name: Gilded Arch
islands.description: Gilded Arch was a Location in the Second Sea located South of Waveborne and South-West of the The Cursed Shores.

islands.name: Grand Reef
islands.description: The Grand Reef is a location in the First Sea found west of Roslit Bay and north-west of Forsaken Shores.

islands.name: Isle of New Beginnings
islands.description: Isle Of New Beginnings is a Location in the Second Sea that can be found North-East of Waveborne.

islands.name: Jungle's Echo
islands.description: Jungle's Echo is a limited time location found past Sunstone Island and Roslit Bay, near The Laboratory.

islands.name: Lobster Shores
islands.description: Lobster Shores was a Location in the First Sea that used to be found South-East of Terrapin Island.

islands.name: Lost Jungle
islands.description: The Lost Jungle is a location that can be found Northeast from Sunstone Island.

islands.name: Luminescent Cavern
islands.description: Luminescent Cavern is a sublocation of the Desolate Deep, unlocked by placing three keystones in the Mysterious Crack.

islands.name: Lushgrove
islands.description: Lushgrove is a Location in the Second Sea that can be found North-West of Waveborne.

islands.name: Mariana's Veil
islands.description: Mariana's Veil is an extensive series of caves stretching over 12,000 studs deep beneath Roslit Bay and the First Sea.

islands.name: Mushgrove Swamp
islands.description: Mushgrove Swamp is a large, swampy landmass in the First Sea located north-east of Moosewood (2425, 130, -670).

islands.name: Netter's Haven
islands.description: Netter's Haven is a Location in the Second Sea that can be found East of Waveborne.

islands.name: Northern Expedition
islands.description: The Northern Expedition is a large mountainous island which features many ice and snow-themed fish.

islands.name: Ocean
islands.description: The Ocean is located between all of the Islands in the First Sea, taking up all the space not occupied by another island.

islands.name: Open Ocean
islands.description: The Open Ocean is located between all of the Islands in the Second Sea, taking up all the space not occupied by another island.

islands.name: Personal Aquarium
islands.description: The Personal Aquarium is a location where players can access from the "Aquariums" menu to display their fish, join others aquarium, and earn online/offline hourly profits.

islands.name: Pine Shoals
islands.description: Pine Shoals is a Location in the Second Sea that can be found West of Waveborne.

islands.name: Scoria Reach
islands.description: Scoria Reach is a large area located Northeast of Grand Reef, this location features a large Volcano where the Temperature inside is extremely high.

islands.name: Statue of Sovereignty
islands.description: The Statue of Sovereignty is an island in the First Sea located north of Moosewood.

islands.name: Terrapin Island
islands.description: Terrapin Island is a large island in the First Sea located South-West of Moosewood.

islands.name: The Cursed Shores
islands.description: The Cursed Shores is a Location in the Second Sea that can be found South-East of Waveborne.

islands.name: The Laboratory
islands.description: The Laboratory is a location in the First Sea located North of Roslit Bay and South-East of Sunstone Island.

islands.name: Tidefall
islands.description: Tidefall is a an extensive cave system beneath the Ocean, only accessible through the Underwater Opening.

islands.name: Trade Plaza
islands.description: The Trade Plaza is a location located externally to the First Sea.

islands.name: Treasure Island
islands.description: Treasure Island is a Location that can be accessed by using the Traveler’s Whistle.

islands.name: Underground Music Venue
islands.description: Underground Music Venue is a location found through a trapdoor the player can enter after a puzzle in the Crystal Cove.

islands.name: Waveborne
islands.description: Waveborne is a location in the center of the Second Sea, serving as the default spawn location for new players.

islands.name: Wrath of Olympus
islands.description: Wrath of Olympus is a large area beneath Atlantis that features several puzzles, quests, and rewards.
